description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a moderately thick bezel. The bezel is matte black and has a simple, unadorned design with slightly rounded corners, giving the monitor a modern and understated appearance. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, oval-shaped pedestal stand that connects to the center of the rear panel, providing stability and a low profile. The rear of the monitor features a recessed panel, adding some visual depth and likely housing internal components. No physical buttons, ports, or branding are visible on any side of the monitor, contributing to its minimalist look. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic, with a smooth, hard surface finish.
description: A modern, matte black flat-panel computer monitor with a thick bezel and a sturdy oval pedestal stand, featuring a minimalist and unbranded design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, black display area framed by a thick, matte bezel and the top of the oval pedestal stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the depth of the rear panel, with the pedestal stand visible at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the recessed back panel and the central attachment of the oval pedestal stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the pedestal stand's base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with slightly rounded corners and a smooth, untextured finish. It is uniform in color and lacks any decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a solid, oval-shaped pedestal base made of black plastic, attached centrally to the rear of the monitor. It appears sturdy and does not show visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
